DG.rule: D is DEFAULT (works in many orientations). G is EXCEPTION: fwd_z < fwd_up (fingers sideways) AND up_z < up_palm_down (palm toward you, not down). Any other orientation stays D.

VHR.rule: V is default (fingers up). R stays from flex (crossed). H is EXCEPTION: fwd_z < fwd_up (fingers sideways).

LPQ.rule: L: fwd_z < -0.50 (fingers UP → very negative fwd_z=-0.921).  Q: fwd_z > +0.55 (fingers DOWN → fwd_z=+0.844).  P: DEFAULT (fingers forward, moderate fwd_z=+0.222).

_note: fwd_z: +1=fingers up, 0=sideways, -1=down  |  up_z: +1=palm faces down (back-of-hand up), 0=palm sideways, -1=palm faces up  |  All three are yaw-invariant (compass direction doesn't matter)
